description: flush-current-session.ts:89 uses a non-null assertion (selectedNoteId!) when constructing SwitchError.pendingNextNoteId on the dirty-fail path. If selectedNoteId is null at this point, the assertion silently passes through null at runtime, producing a SwitchError with pendingNextNoteId=null which violates the SwitchError type contract (pendingNextNoteId: NoteId, not NoteId | null). The selectedNoteId parameter is typed as NoteId | null (line 40). Sprint 1 FIND-006 required explicit null guards instead of non-null assertions, but this instance was not addressed.
